channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Thousands still evacuated near Southern California chemical tank despite eased explosion fears
item.description: Thousands of people who live near a damaged hazardous chemical tank in Southern California still can’t return home, even as officials say the risk of a catastrophic explosion had largely passed.

item.title: Federal court blocks Alabama plan for new congressional districts that could help Republicans
Cornyn tries to keep his Texas Senate seat in a runoff with Trump-backed Paxton
